title: Data Structure Visualization
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a Python script to visualize a binary tree using a graph library. The script should take a binary tree data structure as input and output a visualization of the tree using nodes and edges. The output should include the complete Python script body, with the visualization correctly rendered. The prompt should be under 150 words and use present tense.
constraints: Must use a graph library for visualization
Must include a legend to explain the node and edge colors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the constraints.
Verify the output visualization quality and legend.
